SUBSEQUENT MEMO TO SET FILED BY DEFENDANT JANKOVIC, PETER
DEMAND FOR JURY ON MEMO SETTING FILED BY DEFENDANT JANKOVIC, PETER SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-26-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRIEND, JOSEPH H.,TRUSTEES OF FRIEND LIVING TRUST FRIEND, IDA TRUSTEES OFF THE FRIEND LIVING TRUST SCHILLER, LEON, HUSBAND AND WIFE

CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/HOWARD CHURCHILL AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/MARJORIE KNOLLER AS COUNSEL. SETTLED BY STIP. W/ JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREM- ISES AT 1930 FRANKLIN ST, #10 - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 12NOON, 7-1-94 - DURING THIS PERIOD DEF. WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED A TENANT & WILL NOT PAY ANY RENT DEF. WILL NOT ASSERT ANY TENANT RIGHTS AS A RESULT OF THIS TENANCY - DEF. MUST AVAIL HIMSELF OF THE 1ST AVAILABLE APT. BEFORE 7-1-94 - PL. WILL PAY TO DEF. $1500 ON 6-10-94 - DEF. RELEASES PL. OF ALL CLAIMS UPTO 7-1-94 - TERMS OF THE SETTLE MENT ARE TO BE CONFIDENTIAL - DEF. WARRANT HE AS NO DUPLI- CATE KEYS FOR ANY UNITS & HE WILL RETURN ALL KEYS & RECORDS OF MANAGEMENT TO THE PL. - EACH PARTY WAIVES THEIR RIGHT TO APPEAL - IF ANY TENANT HARASSES THE DEF, THE PL. WILL TAKE APPROPRIATE ACTION. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE STIP & JUDGMENT.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRIEND, JOSEPH H.,TRUSTEES OF FRIEND LIVING TRUST FRIEND, IDA TRUSTEES OFF THE FRIEND LIVING TRUST SCHILLER, LEON, HUSBAND AND WIFE AS TO DEFENDANT JANKOVIC, PETER DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT JANKOVIC, PETER ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED; JURY TRIAL SET; NOTICE MAILED FILED BY DEFENDANT JANKOVIC, PETER JURY TRIAL SET FOR JAN-26-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JANKOVIC, PETER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1930 FRANKLIN ST, APT.#10, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUL-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 7-1-94, 12NOON. ON 6-15-94 PL. WILL PAY DEF. $1,500. PL. WILL EXE- CUTE RELEAS OF ALL CLAIMS AGAINST DEF. TERMS OF STIP. JUDGM. ARE CONFIDENTIAL. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
